title: When email is received move item to group
excerpt: Is there an automation to move an item from one group to another group when an email (address is email column) is received?

posts.author: simongrew (Simon)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an automation to move an item from one group to another group when an email (address is email column) is received?

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @simongrew

Welcome to the monday.com Community!

You can create a custom automation that when the email address column changes to something, it will move the item to another group.

posts.author: Tnerb (Brent)
posts.cookedHtml:
I fail to see how this would be useful.

I want → When item is created and email is example@company.com Move to group

Is this possible?

posts.cookedHtml:
